note: Curated subset of CLDR main exemplarCharacters (the everyday orthographic letters of a locale), pinned in-repo for deterministic orthography-coverage-ratio derivation (spec 043 US2, research Decision 5). Main set only — auxiliary/punctuation/index sets excluded. Characters are NFC single-codepoint letters; the classifier NFC-normalizes the produced set before intersecting. A BCP47 tag whose language subtag is absent here yields the honest `not-derivable` sentinel (never a guessed ratio). Extend by adding a locale key with its CLDR main exemplar letters and re-pinning the sha256 in SOURCES.json.
